name: 01 Matrix
description: Given an m x n binary matrix mat, return the distance of the nearest 0 for each cell. The distance between two adjacent cells is 1. Use multi-source BFS starting from all 0s.
constraints: m == mat.length. n == mat[i].length. 1 <= m, n <= 10^4. 1 <= m * n <= 10^4. mat[i][j] is 0 or 1. There is at least one 0.
